title: Ahh Golem
description: Makes iron golem a little smarter
body:
this mod makes golems a little smarter, faster and more dangerous


<details>
<summary>What exactly does the mod do?</summary>

- They can now build
- Their speed changed from 0.25 to 0.35
- In combination, this allows them to protect villages not only from mobs...

</details>
